title: Creatures of Runeterra a League of Legends mod
description: Creatures of Runeterra is a mod that plans to bring to life the universe of Runeterra into minecraft
body:
![GeckoLib](https://i.imgur.com/Apw18fD.png 'GeckoLib')


 
![COR](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/CoR_title.png 'CoR')

 

## Creatures of Runeterra is a mod that plans to bring to life the universe of Runeterra into minecraft


<details>
<summary>Creatures</summary>

 ![Poros](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/POROS.png 'Poros')

Poro: can be tamed with cookies and can be given weapons and helments. Spawns in snowy biomes.

Fable poro: giving an anvil to a normal poro changes it into a fable poro. Can repair items once per day.

Plunder poro: giving a heart of the sea to a normal poro changes it into a plunder poro. Shoots at enemies.

Porobot: giving a chest to a normal poro changes it into a porobot. It works as a moving chest, it can be given a dispenser to throw potions at the player and a crafting table or a furnace to add said functionalities.(shift+right click to make it sit)

Exalted poro: giving a gold block to a normal poro changes it into a exalted poro. It trades with piglins and can give a random buff to the player for a gold ingot.

 ![Silverwings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/silverwings.png 'Silverwings')

Silverwing: Flying mounts that can be tame with raw meat, and are breed with cooked fish.

 ![Naafiri](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/Naafiri.png 'Naafiri')

Naafiri: Giving the Naafiri dagger to a tamed wolf wil transform it into Naafiri.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Special items</summary>

 ![Items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/SPECIAL_ITEMS.png 'Special Items')

Fishbones: A rocket launcher.

Dunebreaker shield: Rick clicking while holding shift launches a proyectile.

Atlas gauntlet: Rick click to charge the punch, rick click again to launch the player forward.

Tendril compass: Points towards the nearest ancient debri in a 12 block radious.

Fiddle 's birdcage: Shift + MiddleMouse to fire proyectiles that heal the player.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Darkin weapons</summary>

Darkin weapons can be created in the structures called Darkin pedestals, found in the nether at y=50.

 ![DarkinPedestal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/structure.png 'Darkin Pedestal')

Rhaast: Phase through solid objects and become Rhaast. (Items: nether wart/iron hoe/ender eye).

 ![RHAAST](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/rhaast%20recipe.png 'Rhaast')

 Naafiri: Transform a wolf into Naafiri. (Items: bone block/wooden sword/wither skeleton skull).

 ![Naafiri](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/naafiri_recipe.png 'Naafiri')

 To upgrade a darkin weapon to higher damages you need to place two weapons at the sides.

 ![RUPGRADE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/rhaast%20upgrade.png 'Rhaast upgrade')

</details>

<details>
<summary>Enemies</summary>

Reksai: can be summon using the drill in the desert.

![REKSAI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/reksai.png "Rek'Sai")

Xer'sai Dunebreaker: Spawns in void caves in the deserts.

Xer'sai hatchling: Spawns in deserts.

Fiddlesticks: Must be summon during night.

 ![RITUAL](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/fiddle_ritual.png 'Ritual')
 
Fiddlesticks ritual: Must be summon during night, the armor stand need: 
scarecrow helment / scarecrow chestplate / iron leggings / chainmail boots.

 ![FIDDLE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/fiddlesticks.png 'Fiddle')

</details>


<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

 ![RECIPES](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicolasIannello/img/main/recipes.png 'Recipes')

</details>
